summary: Realigned tender regression coverage to real delivered-role semantics. Tender verification now uses finance, pm, and executive role profiles instead of group-only users that were polluted by default owner overlay.

notes: This batch only changes regression coverage.
Tender ACL and view semantics remain unchanged from the already-validated implementation.
Future tender audits should use delivered-role samples instead of group-only user creation.

next_step: Continue the non-first-batch objective by selecting the next uncovered representative secondary-flow family after tender closure.
